Built for brokers.
Not against them.

Qualified leads. Structured data.
The platform that fights for your side.

Covarage — the insurance OS for SMEs.

THE MARKET REALITY

Everyone is trying
to replace you.

🤖
AI aggregators want to cut the broker out entirely. Automate the quote, automate the bind, keep the margin.
💰
Bolttech raised $740M trying to build direct-to-consumer insurance. They still can't get live quotes because carriers won't open their systems.
📉
Commoditisation. Platforms that treat you as a cost to be eliminated. Your relationships reduced to a comparison table.
👻
Cold leads that waste your time. Unqualified. Incomplete requirements. No urgency. No budget. They ghost after the first call.

Covarage is the only platform built to empower brokers.

Insurance is sold, not bought. The industry runs on broker relationships. Every platform trying to replace you is fighting the structure of the market itself. We're the platform built around that structure.

COVARAGE
AGGREGATORS
Works through brokers
Tries to replace brokers
Sends you qualified leads with structured data
Competes with you for the same client
Makes you look better — transparency builds trust
Commoditises you into a comparison row
Your relationship. Your client.
Their platform. Their client.

WHAT YOU GET

Qualified leads.
Zero guesswork.

Every lead that reaches you through Covarage has already told us what they need. You don't spend time qualifying. You spend time quoting.

Structured Data

Every lead arrives with: company name, UEN, industry, headcount, insurance type needed, renewal deadline. No back-and-forth to get basics.

Genuine Intent

These companies came to Covarage because they need insurance now. Compliance deadlines. Lease requirements. Renewal in 30 days. Not window shopping.

Transparency

Quote status tracking visible to both you and the client. They see you're working. You see when they open. No more "did they get my quote?"

HOW IT WORKS

From lead to placement.

1
SME signs up on Covarage
They complete the compliance check, upload policies, or request a broker callback. Their requirements are captured automatically.
2
We match to you
Based on your specialisation and coverage type, we route the lead to you with full structured data. Industry, headcount, deadline, requirements.
3
You contact the client
Callback within 1 business day. The client is expecting your call. They already have context. No cold intro.
4
Quote, bind, done
You quote. Client accepts. Policy binds. The client's documents go into their CovaVault. Renewal reminder set. They come back to you next year.

WHY SMES USE COVARAGE

What drives the leads to you.

SMEs come to Covarage because insurance is painful and they don't know where to start. Here's what brings them in — and why they need you.

Compliance pressure

Their landlord requires insurance for the lease. MOM requires WICA. They need it sorted — and they need someone who knows what they're doing.

Renewal chaos

Policies expiring. No broker responding. They're looking for someone reliable. That's you.

First-time buyers

New businesses that just incorporated. They have no existing broker relationship. They're choosing one for the first time — through Covarage.

These are IFA clients, not agent clients. We work exclusively with independent brokers who represent the company. Your clients get access to the full market. That's the promise.

JOIN THE PILOT

Free access. Shape the product. Be first in line.

We're onboarding our founding broker partners now. Pilot partners get full platform access at no cost — and a seat at the table when we design the tools you'll use every day.

Free during pilot

Full access to the broker dashboard, client management tools, and lead matching. No subscription. No per-lead fees. No catch.

Your feedback builds the product

The first brokers on the platform set the standard. What you need, we build. What doesn't work, we fix. You're not a user — you're a co-builder.

When leads flow, you're first

We're building the SME pipeline in parallel. Corpsec partners, landlords, direct signups. Pilot brokers get priority matching from day one. Early in, first served.

Your existing clients stay yours. Covarage never contacts your existing book. You can also bring your existing clients onto the platform and manage them through our tools — for free.

THE SIGNAL LOOP

Speed and responsiveness
win you more leads.

Quote turnaround is tracked. Brokers who respond fast get matched more often.
Client satisfaction signals feed back into matching. Good service compounds.
Transparency works in your favour. When clients see you're fast and thorough, they stay.
The brokers who win on Covarage are the ones who were already good — now with a platform that proves it.

This isn't a race to the bottom on price. It's a race to the top on service.

THE TECHNOLOGY

Your client management platform. Already built.

You don't need to build another AI tool or CRM. Covarage gives you the technology stack to manage your SME clients — renewals, documents, communication — without building anything yourself.

Client Dashboard

See every client, their policies, renewal dates, and requirements in one view. Manage your entire SME book from one screen.

Renewal Tracking

Automated reminders at 60, 30, and 14 days. Your clients never lapse. You never miss a renewal conversation.

Quote & Status Pipeline

Track every quote from request to bind. Your client sees progress. You see engagement. No more "where's my quote?" calls.

This is SaaS you'd pay for — free during pilot. Other brokers build internal tools or pay for expensive CRMs. You get a purpose-built insurance management platform at zero cost while you help us make it perfect.

OUR POSITION

Brokers carry this industry.
We built the platform
that carries brokers.

We will never compete with you for clients.
We will never sell direct-to-consumer behind your back.
We will never commoditise your work into a comparison table without your consent.
Your clients are your clients. We're the infrastructure that brings you more of them.

The leads are coming.
Be the broker
they're matched to.

Covarage is a technology platform that helps businesses organise insurance information and connect with licensed insurance brokers. COVA is not an insurer and does not provide insurance advice or recommendations. All quotations, policies, and coverage decisions are provided by licensed brokers and insurers.
